name: Tadpole Swimmer
short_description: A Fantasy Journey of a Sperm
detailed_description:
This game is about a sperm's journey of magic and wonder, offers beautifully crafted graphic design, it's simple to play yet fun with endless challenges.

Just click the screen to move, Dashing forward, Smashing the enemies, Collecting treasures along the way, Finding the Egg to the end, competing with friends!

Unleash your inner energy to win the most important RACE OF YOUR LIFE!

Features:
- Cute sperms and germs.
- Hand drawn artworks and textures.
- Procedural generated vagina.
- Leaderboard
- Achievements
